title: chaenomeles angustifolia var. eburnea
intro: Chaenomeles angustifolia var. eburnea, also known as the Dwarf Flowering Quince, is a compact shrub native to China, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and glossy leaves. The medicinal properties of Chaenomeles angustifolia var. eburnea have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Chaenomeles angustifolia var. eburnea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
